title: Mahavira's Last Sermon: The Final Teaching
description: Mahavira's final words before achieving moksha: complete non-attachment, complete non-violence, complete liberation.
introduction: Mahavira's final words before achieving moksha: complete non-attachment, complete non-violence, complete liberation.

translation.text: Endure all things with equanimity. Do not harbor anger. Do not boast. Do not deceive. Free yourself from all bonds.
